projects.title: FeelWellFurniture
projects.subtitle: Furniture e-commerce website
projects.summary: A modern responsive e-commerce site for a local furniture business.
projects.description: Built a React storefront with product catalog pages, detailed product views, theme support, and polished mobile-friendly interactions.
highlights: Built responsive product catalog and product detail pages
Implemented dark and light theme support
Used Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion for a polished animated UI

projects.title: StudySearcher
projects.subtitle: Student matching and messaging platform
projects.summary: A full-stack application that helps students find study partners based on shared classes and availability.
projects.description: StudySearcher allows students to create profiles, add classes, find compatible study partners, and communicate through real-time messaging.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio
projects.subtitle: Portfolio and technical blog
projects.summary: A responsive personal portfolio built to showcase software projects, experience, and homelab writing.
projects.description: A React portfolio with reusable project components, JSON-managed content, and a technical blog.
highlights: Built reusable project and experience cards

projects.title: Homelab
projects.subtitle: Self-hosted server infrastructure
projects.summary: A personal homelab for experimenting with servers, virtualization, containers, monitoring, and self-hosted services.
projects.description: An ongoing infrastructure project focused on running and maintaining self-hosted services, managing server resources, exploring virtualization, and building practical systems administration experience.
highlights: Experimented with virtualization, containers, and server monitoring
Built hands-on experience with Linux systems and home networking
